headline: Dollar Wraps Up Best Month Since 2024 Amid War in Middle East
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The dollar is on track for its best month since October 2024 as war in the Middle East upends energy markets, buffets economic forecasts, and sends investors rushing to the world’s primary reserve currency.Buoyed by those haven flows, the Bloomberg Dollar Spot Index is up about 3% this month. The US position as the world’s largest producer of oil has also supported the currency amid a surge in global energy prices, as have fading expectations for global growth. “The dollar rallied
